zh.lifeSummary: Dorothy Stevens於1559年12月16日出生在英國英格蘭波克夏斯迪文頓。她於大約1591年9月23日與Robert Parker在英國維爾爾帕特尼結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1649年10月10日在英國英格蘭維爾爾米爾登哈爾享年89歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Dorothy Stevens于1559年12月16日出生在英国英格兰波克夏斯迪文頓。她于大约1591年9月23日与Robert Parker在英国維爾爾帕特尼结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1649年10月10日在英国英格兰維爾爾米爾登哈爾享年89岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾波利。

nameMeanings.name: Stevens
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London), Flemish, Dutch, and North German: patronymic from the personal name Steven . The surname of Flemish origin is also found in the Walloon part of Belgium. In North America, the English form of the surname has also absorbed some like-sounding Jewish names and various other European cognates, e.g. Greek Stefanidis , Serbian Stevanović (see Stevanovic ), Slovenian and Slovak Štefanič (see Stefanic ).

variants.name: Stephans
meanings: Probably an Americanized form of North German Steffans, a patronymic from Steffan , or of its cognate Steffens .

variants.name: Steeves
meanings: English (Lancashire): from a shortened form of   Stevens  . Compare   Steveson  .

variants.name: Steven
meanings: Scottish, English, Dutch, and North German: from the personal name Steven, from Latin Stephanus, Greek Stephanos ‘crown’. This was a popular name throughout Christendom in the Middle Ages, having been borne by the first Christian martyr, stoned to death at Jerusalem three years after the death of Christ. In North America, this surname has also absorbed various cognates from other languages, e.g. German Steffen , German and Polish Stefan , Slovenian and Slovak Štefan, Hungarian István (see Istvan ), and also their patronymics and other derivatives (see Stevens ).

nameMeanings.name: Dorothy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothee
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothie
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Dorothy Stevens was born on 16 December 1559, in Steventon, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Robert Parker about 23 September 1591, in Patney, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died about 10 October 1649, in Mildenhall, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 89, and was buried in Burnley, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Dorothy Stevens est née le 16 décembre 1559, à Steventon, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Robert Parker environ 23 septembre 1591, à Patney, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 10 octobre 1649, à Mildenhall, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 89 ans, et a été enterrée à Burnley, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Dorothy Stevens wurde am 16. Dezember 1559 in Steventon, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat um 23. September 1591 in Patney, Wiltshire, England Robert Parker geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 10. Oktober 1649 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Mildenhall, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Burnley, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Dorothy Stevens è nata il il 16 dicembre 1559 nel Steventon, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Robert Parker circa 23 settembre 1591, nel Patney, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì circa 10 ottobre 1649, nel Mildenhall, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 89 anni, e fu sepolta a Burnley, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Dorothy Stevensは1559年12月16日にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアステベントンで生まれた。約1591年9月23日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアプアトニーでRobert Parkerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1649年10月10日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアミルデンハルで89歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアブルンリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Dorothy Stevens(은)는 1559년 12월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 스티븐턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1591년 9월 23일 영국 윌츠히르 패트니에서 Robert Parker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1649년 10월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 미데홀에서 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 번리에 묻혔다.

pt.16 December 1559–Abt 10 October 1649: 16 de dezembro de 1559–aproximadamente 10 de outubro de 1649
pt.lifeSummary: Dorothy Stevens nasceu em 16 de dezembro de 1559, em Steventon, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Robert Parker aproximadamente 23 de setembro de 1591, em Patney, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 10 de outubro de 1649, em Mildenhall, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 89 anos, e foi sepultada em Burnley, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Dorothy Stevens родилась 16 декабря 1559 г. в местности стивентон, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Parker около 23 сентября 1591 г. в местности патни, уилцхир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 10 октября 1649 г. в местности маилденолл, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 89 лет и была похоронена в местности бурнли, ланкашир, Англия.

es.16 December 1559–Abt 10 October 1649: 16 de diciembre de 1559–aproximadamente 10 de octubre de 1649
es.lifeSummary: Dorothy Stevens nació el 16 de diciembre de 1559, en Steventon, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Robert Parker aproximadamente 23 de septiembre de 1591, en Patney, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 10 de octubre de 1649, en Mildenhall, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 89 años, y fue sepultada en Burnley, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
